titleStmt.title: SII 38.286: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 286. (A.R. No. 286 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is in several pieces. The first portion of the record which is incomplete, states that the members of the sabhā of Maḻalai-maṅgalam in Kaṉṟūrnāḍu (a sub-division) of Maṇaiyiṟ-kōṭṭam sold thousand kuḻi of land, freed from taxes to Paḷḷikoṅgat-Tiraiyan Kaliyan Sēri alias Śivakoḻunduk Kaṇṇappan, a resident of Śivaṉkūḍal in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam for providing food offerings and conducting other ritual and services to the god Śiṅgakoḻundāṇḍār on the occasion of the asterism of uttiraṭṭādi in the Tamil month of Āṉi. Several persons figure is signatories.

The same spot contains various fragmentary inscriptions engraved on loose stones which are haphazardly fixed into the wall. It appears they belong to the reign of Kulōttuṅga I and they refer to some land grant to the temple.

The one fragmentary inscription which is dated in Śaka 1422 (cyclic year Rautiri, month Chittirai 10, April 5, 1500 A.D.) seems to refer to some land grant by an accountant of Śivakūḍal to the temple. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10vatu maṇaiyiṟkkoṭṭattu kaṉṟūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam maḻalaimaṅkalattu sabhaikku camainta nelli ki
ṟṟa malaikiniyaniṉṟānpaṭṭanenum Ikkuṭi Aruḷāḷapaṭṭanenum Ikkuṭi tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭanenum Eṉūr Irāmapirānpaṭṭanenum Akki tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭanenum Ikkuṭi
neṉum Ikkuṭik kecavapaṭṭaneṉum Ikkuṭi Iḷainārāyaṇa paṭṭaneṉum kārāmpicceṭṭu Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaneṉum Ivvaṉaivom pūmi vilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Eṅ
kaḷurt teṉ kaḻaniyil kāṭṭu pāṭakattil Ellaikkālukku vaṭakku kiḻpāṟkkellai marutammalaikkālukku meṟkkum teṉpārkkellai Uṭkarai Akappaṭṭa nirpokikku
vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai mukaṭṭuk kālu(kkālu)kkuk kiḻakkum nakkaṉ pokiḷa taṭi Iraṇṭukkum vaṭavarampukkut teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa taṭi pala vinālvati
cāṇ kolālkuḻi Āyiramum viṟṟuttara peṟu k kāṇam kiḻikai civitittu
kūttaneṉ Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu nirveḷurnāṭṭu civankūṭal paḷḷikoṅkat tiraiyankaliyan ceriyāna civakoḻuntuk kaṇṇappanen yāniceāruṉ
ṭār ciṅkakoḻun=tāṇṭārkku tiruvāni Uttiraṭṭāti Eḻun=taruḷukaikku Amutupaṭikkum kuṟaivaṟuppukkum Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟuttarak koḷ�
The wall over which the above inscription is engraved has several loose stones fixed containing inscriptions.

neṉ ṟakkuṟiya nellikkunṟa malaikiniya niṉṟāṉ ṭi Aruḷāḷa paṭṭanenum Ikkuṭi tiruvaraṅka paṭ
m Enūr Irāmapirānpaṭṭaṉum Aiyakki tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭaṉum Ikkuṭi nārāyaṇapaṭṭanenum Ikkuṭikke
neṉum Ikkuṭi Iḷaiyanārāyaṇa(ya)paṭṭaṉum kāraāmpicceṭṭu Aruḷāḷapaṭṭanenum piṟakkūṟiya ke
taraiya kaliyanceriyāna civakkoḻuntukkaṇṇappanukku tiruvāni Uttiraṭṭāti tirunāḷ Eḻu
kaikku Amutupaṭikkum nāṅkaḷ Ādidāsaṉśaṇḍeśvarardevar pakkal Emmili
vilaippoṉ muṟṟum Āvaṇakkaḷikaik kiḻikai celakkoṇṭu Oru kālāvatu
vatum kālāvatu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟupporuḷ
ce ytu kuṭuttom Innilañcuṭṭi van=taan=tara
yil vācalāl pon=tanavum Eṉṟu collap�
ce ñcirā Amañci ceyyātārakaḷākavum Annir mu

vūr mahādevar civakkoḻun=tāṇṭār
Ātidāsancaṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastta
tu Udakam paṇṇik kuṭutta nilamā
vatu kiḻpāṟkellai naṭaidāya ceṟu
melaikkāl varampukku meṟku n=tenpāṟke
llai Idevar tenma koṭṭaiyappan vaṭava

svastiśrī . cālivākaṉa cākābdam 100 4 10 22
mel cellaā niṉṟa ravutiri varuṣam cittirai mātam
10 nāḷ civakūṭal kaṇakku tāḷappi
varumarāṉa muṟtiyappaṉ tevaku
nṟa kocaḷam paṉṟi kuṭutta
tovi tāyāravarkaḷ naṭurai ve
niyya Āka Eṅka māṉiyamāṉatukku veṭ
ṭil muḷḷaṅkālukku kiḻakku patiṉaṟu cāṇko
lāl kuḻi 2 100ku Eriyaṅkāḷ po
ka niṉṟu pātiyil 6 100 cernta paṅku kāl
ṇṭāṉ kuḻi 1000000 paṅkāḷi
yā �yil yām
kolu

tiraṇṭiṟṟa
ṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟi(ma)malai
ṟuṭaintoṭa viḻukaṭalkaḷun taṅ
nāḷiṭṭa palamutu

viyum vāḷāvaṭṭam
ṭaḷu māṅka maṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṉ
ṅkoṇṭa Āka It tiruppuyattilaṅ
cai mevalar viḷaṅka mi
ṭaiyār śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadeva
coḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukke
sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaieḻut
�r Ādidāsacaṇḍeśvaradevar pakka

Iraṅkal Āḻvi
�nattu meṟkkum
ṭukkal varampu
kku melpāṟkellai Erikaraikku
vaṭapāṟkkellai paḻantevatānam
ceṟuvukkut teṟkum Inṉānkel
ṭakappaṭṭa nilam ta nirnilam patinṟu
kuḻi Ūrāṟ nārāyaṇappū
�ṇikka viḷanta
Digital edition of SII 38.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
